summary: Updated EXTENSION.md, README.md, claudemd.md, and CLAUDE.md to document Zotero search and import capabilities. Added --search and --task command rows to all 4 files, enriched Index Schema with 4 new fields (bib_key, zotero_key, zotero_path, project_tags), added Zotero Search and Import workflow section to README.md, and updated skill-literature description across claudemd.md and CLAUDE.md.

artifacts.summary: Implementation summary for literature extension documentation updates
